title: bazaz #0962
definition:
1) to spoil, plunder, prey upon, seize
    1a) (Qal) to spoil, plunder, despoil
    1b) (Niphal) to be spoiled, plundered
    1c) (Pual) to be taken as spoil
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to spoil, plunder, prey upon, seize
    1a) (Qal) to spoil, plunder, despoil
    1b) (Niphal) to be spoiled, plundered
    1c) (Pual) to be taken as spoil

    NASB:  to spoil, plunder
